title: Video 10 - Gobind Trades
transcript_text: The Canada Revenue Agency has made a massive announcement and they have done so to every CPA and tax lawyer in Canada. They have come right out and said that if you are doing income tax or corporate taxes and you're going from 2022 backwards, when you are sending in amendments on tax returns, which you're allowed to do for up to 20 years, they're not even going to address them. until March of 2026. Why? Well, they're holding onto your money as long as they possibly can. Why? They have fired 5,000 people and they're going to use that as the excuse, but that's not the real reason. Why? Is because they're going to go out of their way to make sure they don't have to give you any money. Why? Here's the big one, is that under clause seven of the Taxpayers Bill of Rights, which we invoke all of the time, you have the right to not owe any tax dollars at all until you've had an impartial review. But if they are not even going to look at your taxes until March of next year they can charge interest from now until that time and continue all of their onslaught and attacks and all of their crimes which is to lie committing fraud, to extort you, to threaten you, to intimidate you. That's a big one. That's five years in prison if you are convicted. This is what they have chosen to do. And every single solitary tax lawyer and charter professional accountant in Canada has had this announcement made and they haven't told you. That is the problem. I did my show, which is the tax and money show. It runs every single Tuesday at 9 p.m. Eastern time on this Instagram and TikTok

full_text:
[Transcript 02:47 → 04:20]: taxes for you with my moral code and my way of doing taxes, not the way that QuickBooks and everybody else does it. So I also will no longer for the rest of this year be doing corporate tax. It's pointless. It is pointless to do corporate tax because no matter what we show them and how accurate we are, they're not even going to look at your tax files until March. So here's the deal, everybody. I have a solution for everybody in Canada who has corporate debt. Sell me your corporation I will take all of your corporate debt away from you in its entirety get you into a brand new numbered corporation with a new GST or HST number where you can start over at zero and just go ahead and never pay tax again for the rest of your life don waste your time doing corporate taxes just sell me the company it cheaper and I can get it done for you in between three and five days There no reason for you as a corporate owner, as a business owner, as a human being to wait until March, April, May or whenever of next year for them to get their act together and actually look at your taxes and then assess them which you know they will do in their favor and not in your favor. It's a very big problem that the CRA is causing for everybody. But if your accountant or your lawyer, your tax lawyer, have not contacted you yet by telephone or better yet by email for them to let you know this, then they are not good people. They know what I know. They have just chosen not to tell you so they can continue charging you
